category_sources: source_facts.description says Topiary is a uniform formatter for simple languages in the Tree-sitter ecosystem.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is topiary and source_facts.homepage is the official Topiary site.
docs_sources: Official Topiary site hosts the Topiary Book documentation at topiary.tweag.io/book/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/tweag/topiary, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies formatting and Tree-sitter; source_facts.executables lists topiary.
